meta.title: svg2rc — SVG to React Component
meta.description: Convert SVG into a React component (JSX or TSX) right in the browser. Open source, fully client-side.

output.title: Component
output.empty: The code will appear here once you paste a valid SVG.
output.fixError: Fix the SVG on the left to see the generated component.

shortcut.title: Create a svg2rc shortcut?
shortcut.descriptionNative: Add svg2rc to your desktop or home screen to open it like an app, without typing the URL.
shortcut.descriptionManual: In Chrome/Edge: menu ⋮ → Install app / Create shortcut. On Safari (iOS): Share → Add to Home Screen.

validation.empty: The panel is empty. Paste an SVG to get started.
validation.noSvgTag: No <svg> tag found in the content.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.pageFailedBody: Something went wrong on our end. You can try refreshing or head back home.
